entities.name: RAINWATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of efficiently managing rainwater to enhance agricultural productivity

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output and efficiency

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID DRYLANDS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low precipitation and dry conditions

entities.name: RAINFED AREAS
entities.description: Agricultural regions that depend exclusively on rainfall for water

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: Economic state of deprivation common in rainfed areas

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient water resources to meet demands

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the biological or chemical quality of soil

entities.name: SOCIAL AND PHYSICAL CAPITAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth of infrastructure and social resources

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural systems relying on rainfall rather than irrigation

entities.name: CROP YIELDS
entities.description: The amount of crop harvested per unit area

entities.name: LIMITED WATER
entities.description: Insufficient water availability for crop growth

entities.name: WATER AND SOIL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The strategic management of water and soil to improve agricultural output
